cripsum.openingLootbox.description: Shown when the user is opening a lootbox

cripsum.justPulled.description: Shown after pulling an item from a lootbox. {{item}} is the item name.

cripsum.testingLuck.description: Shown while the lootbox animation is playing

cripsum.lookingAtProfile.description: Shown when viewing a specific user's profile.

cripsum.stalkingProfiles.description: Shown when on a profile page but no username is found

cripsum.watchingEdits.description: Shown when on the edits page but no specific edit is active

cripsum.listeningToTrack.description: Shown when an edit is playing but no music info is available

cripsum.editsGallery.description: Shown on the edits gallery page

cripsum.choosingEdit.description: Shown when browsing the edits gallery without watching one

cripsum.duelLobby.description: Shown when in the Cripsum Duel lobby

cripsum.inLobby.description: Shown when in the lobby but not matchmaking

cripsum.matchEnded.description: Shown when the result modal is visible but no title/kicker is found

cripsum.spectating.description: Shown in spectator mode. {{p1}} is player 1, {{p2}} is player 2.

cripsum.vsOpponent.description: Shown during an active duel. {{opponent}} is the opponent's name.

cripsum.room.description: Small image tooltip showing the room code. {{room}} is the room code.

cripsum.opponent.description: Fallback label when the opponent's name is not found

cripsum.pickingTeam.description: Shown during the team-picking phase. {{counter}} is the counter (e.g. 1/3).

cripsum.waitingOpponent.description: Shown when waiting for an opponent in the arena

cripsum.inArena.description: Fallback shown when in the arena panel

cripsum.achievements.description: Shown when viewing the achievements page

cripsum.unlockedAchievements.description: Shown with unlock count. {{unlocked}} is unlocked, {{total}} is total.

cripsum.huntingAchievements.description: Shown when on achievements page but no count is found

cripsum.downloadingYoshukai.description: Shown when downloading the Yoshukai course

cripsum.downloadingStuff.description: Fallback shown on any other download page

cripsum.buyingStuff.description: State shown on the store page

cripsum.applyingForTeam.description: Shown on the team application page

cripsum.sellingSoul.description: State shown on the team application page

cripsum.applyForTeam.description: Label for the 'Apply for the team' button

cripsum.profileEditor.description: Shown on the profile editor page

cripsum.editingProfile.description: State shown on the profile editor page

cripsum.aboutUs.description: Shown on the about us / chi siamo page

cripsum.lookingAtTeam.description: State shown on the chi siamo page

cripsum.signingUp.description: State shown on the signup page

cripsum.loggingIn.description: State shown on the login page

cripsum.supportingCripsum.description: State shown on the donations page

cripsum.gamblingAway.description: State shown on the gambling page

cripsum.buyingMerch.description: State shown on the merch page

cripsum.lookingForHelp.description: State shown on the support page

cripsum.lookingAtQuandel.description: State shown on the Quandel57 page

cripsum.topRimasti.description: Shown on the Top Rimasti page

cripsum.lookingAtRimasti.description: State shown on the Top Rimasti page

cripsum.lookingAtShitposts.description: State shown on the shitpost page

cripsum.globalChat.description: Shown on the global chat page

cripsum.chatting.description: State shown on the global chat page

cripsum.lookingAtInventory.description: State shown on the inventory page

cripsum.grindingMissions.description: State shown on the missions page
